name: 被逼當眾脫衣（霸凌場景）
description: 反派在高檔場所門口強迫女主脫衣，是極端的階級壓迫視覺化。這種場景將觀眾的憤怒推到頂點，為英雄救美創造最佳切入時機。
tags: 尊嚴被踐踏的極端視覺——公共場所、眾目睽睽下的羞辱製造最強的觀眾共情

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: I can let you in if you take them off. / What are you waiting for? Hurry. Take this bitch's clothes off. / And besides, Mr. Baratheon and Mr. Stark are both men. What man doesn't like a nice horny strip show?
